facts.claim: 26 rules, 3 parallel shock pathways: v3 'estabilidade' (criterio_1-13, RULE-001..016), 'manual' (C1-C6, RULE-017..023), 'estabilizacao'/trilha2 v1 (criterio_1-6, RULE-024/025) — overlapping intent, different thresholds/units.
Of v3's 13 criteria only 7,10,12,13 feed the alert via RULE-014; criterio_1-6,8,9,11 (RULE-001-006,008,009,011) are fully coded but never invoked — dead code.

Themes: hypoperfusion (TEC, lactate, shock index), vasopressor ladder (nora->vasopressina->hidrocortisona->adrenalina->dobutamina), fluid balance, bicarbonate stewardship, antihypertensive-vasopressor conflicts, BP recurrence.
Facade alert-text (RULE-015,016,024) often tests different conditions/units than the predicate code it narrates — text and firing logic drift independently (3+ mismatches found).
v3 model reports tipo/nome='estabilizacao', colliding with the separate estabilizacao pathway; nora appears in ml/h (v3), mcg/kg/min (016), mcg/kg/h (024) for the same >0.5 cutoff.
By type (26): formula=2, threshold=13, decision-tree=10, validation=1.
By verdict (26): VERIFIED=4 (002,003,004,006), DISCREPANCY=12, UNVERIFIABLE=2 (010,022), NOT_APPLICABLE=8 (verify:false aggregators, no clinical anchor).
RULE-001: sign error, code sums ALL-history balance vs +2000 not doc'd BHA<-2000/6h; also swaps a Ringer-bolus check for lactate>0.5. DISCREPANCY, unwired.
RULE-003: nora(6h)+(TEC>3s OR lactate>=2) matches Sepsis-3/ANDROMEDA-SHOCK; VERIFIED but unwired.
RULE-007: nora>20ml/h w/o vasopressin/hydrocortisone, WIRED->VERMELHO; facade(016) claims unverifiable 0.5mcg/kg/min cutoff from ml/h. DISCREPANCY moderate.
RULE-010: antihypertensive+nora>50ml/h, WIRED->VERMELHO; checks 16/18 drugs (omits anlodipino, metoprolol). UNVERIFIABLE institutional list.
RULE-013: WIRED->AMARELO; ANDs PAS>155/PAD>90 count==2 (doc: OR/last-2); I64/AVCi exclusion filters dict KEYS not values, permanently vacuous.
RULE-016 (escalation-ladder text): mcg/kg/min cutoffs (>0.5,>1.5) and FC>130bpm dobutamine-stop, none checked by paired v3 ml/h predicates. DISCREPANCY high, worst clinical_impact in cluster.
RULE-023: counts all 6 manual criteria incl. criterio_6, but get_payload shows only 1..5 — c6 can drive VERMELHO/AMARELO invisibly.
RULE-024: key gap skips criteria 8-9; nora dose labelled mcg/kg/H vs mcg/kg/MIN in sibling RULE-016 for same >0.5 cutoff. AMBIGUOUS/DISCREPANCY.
RULE-022: exact equality nora==50ml (not threshold) + dobuta>10ml/h — implausible for continuous infusion. UNVERIFIABLE.

Systemic: dead code (001-006,008,009,011); window bug (001 all-time not 6h/4h); unit drift nora ml/h vs mcg/kg/min vs mcg/kg/h (007,016,024); AND/OR inversions (012,013); vacuous guard (013); equality-not-threshold (022); payload/alert desync (023).

Feeds v2 domains: sepsis, hemodynamics, early-warning-scores (shock index), pharmaco (vasopressor dosing), correlation (text-vs-predicate drift), governance (RATIFY institutional thresholds), retire-candidate (dead v3 criteria, duplicate estabilizacao pathway).

Preserve verbatim: VERMELHO/AMARELO/NEUTRO; 'Estabilidade'/'Estabilizacao'; 'BH acumulado negativo em mais de 2000ml'; 'Lactato >2mmol/L sem DVA e VM. Choque oculto?'; 'Indice de choque positivo'; 'Indicar apenas se pH<7,15 e BIC<16'; 'Noradrenalina >0,5mcg/kg/min, associar corticoide e vasopressina'.

constraints.text: MUST NOT port the 9 unwired v3 criteria (RULE-001-006,008,009,011) as live behavior; ADOPT requires re-wiring justification.
MUST normalize noradrenaline dosing to mcg/kg/min before cross-pathway reuse; ml/h, mcg/kg/min, mcg/kg/h values (RULE-007,016,024) are not directly comparable.
MUST route RULE-010 (16-vs-18 drug list) and RULE-022 (nora==50 equality) to RATIFY — institutional, no clinical anchor.

open_questions: Which pathway (v3 estabilidade, manual, estabilizacao/trilha2) is source of truth for v2, or should all be superseded?
Is the -2000mL fluid-balance cutoff (RULE-001) and 1000mL Ringer-lactate anchor (RULE-004) institutional, or should it reconcile to SSC 30 mL/kg?
